text: The transition from the sterile corridor—marked by clean lines, glass, and the ever-present symbol of risk in the fire hose—to this colorful, immersive R+D space makes me feel both curious and slightly unsettled. The environment radiates innovation and playfulness, yet I sense a disorientation reflected back at me by the text on the screen: "I sense confusion and a lack of clarity... my vision is obscured." It reminds me how fragile perception is, how easily certainty slips away in new, brightly lit domains. I feel keenly aware of both creative possibility and the unease of ambiguity.
